programme.title: Gaither Gospel Hour
programme.desc: The Gaither Vocal Band performs with a host of gospel artists from all across the United States; it is headed by Bill and Gloria Gaither.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: What Do You Think of Yourself?
programme.desc: Do you battle negative self-talk? Joyce reveals how to align your thoughts with God's truth so you can walk in the confidence, peace and joy He intends for you.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: Is He From History or From Eternity?
programme.desc: Sermon series: "The Jesus You May Not Know"; Understanding life in the light of Jesus' eternal love.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Matt Crouch, Laurie Crouch and Joseph Prince clear up some views on healing.

programme.title: Worship With The Binions and Friends
programme.desc: David and Nicole Binion host dynamic nights of worship with live music from top gospel artists.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Stop the Pain: The Six to Fix
programme.desc: Dr. Scott Hannen shares how to unlock the body's potential to heal itself.

programme.title: Why Israel Matters
programme.desc: Mat Staver walks the steps of the Passion Week to give an inspired close-up of Jesus' death and resurrection; College students share about first-hand experience as they explore the Holy Land in all its beauty and complexity.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Jay Haizlip hosts from Anaheim, Calif.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Battlefield of the Mind
programme.desc: Joyce preaching the word of God. Join Joyce Meyer to discover the power of every word you speak.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: Is He From the Old Testament or the New Testament?
programme.desc: Sermon series: "The Jesus You May Not Know"; finding Jesus in the Hebrew Scriptures; predictions about Jesus' life in the books of the Old Testament.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Healthy living doesn't start where you think it does. Learn how to think in agreement with God for better mental health and enjoyment in life.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.desc: Real truths for real life, discover clarity, purpose and a better way to live every day.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.desc: The teaching ministry of American Southern Baptist pastor and television host, Robert Jeffress; he is a senior minister of the First Baptist Church in Dallas as well as a Fox News contributor.

programme.title: Life Today
programme.sub-title: Mark and Trina Hankins: The Confession of Faith
programme.desc: The author of "The Great Confession" reveals the power of speaking and believing God's word over everything else.

programme.title: The Supernatural Now
programme.desc: Apostle Guillermo Maldonado is the Sr. Pastor and founder of King Jesus International Ministry (Ministerio Internacional El Rey Jesus), considered one of the fastest growing multicultural churches in the United States.

programme.title: Rick Renner
programme.desc: God wants to reveal His will to you by His spirit, so don't excuse ignorance when truth is available.

programme.title: Ron Carpenter
